Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class ConversationRecordLookup

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.ConversationRecordLookup
public class ConversationRecordLookup extends Object

Java class for ConversationRecordLookup complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ConversationRecordLookup">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="SObjectType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="conditions" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}ConversationRecordLookupCondition" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="filterLogic" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lookupFields" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}ConversationRecordLookupField" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="maxLookupResults" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="sortFieldName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sortOrder" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}SortOrder" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sourceVariableName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sourceVariableType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ConversationVariableType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="targetVariableName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getSObjectType

      public String getSObjectType()
      Gets the value of the sObjectType property.
      Returns:
      possible object is String

    • setSObjectType

      public void setSObjectType(String value)
      Sets the value of the sObjectType property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is String

    • getConditions

      public List<ConversationRecordLookupCondition> getConditions()
      Gets the value of the conditions property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the conditions property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getConditions().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ConversationRecordLookupCondition

      Returns:
      The value of the conditions property.

    • getFilterLogic

      public String getFilterLogic()
      Gets the value of the filterLogic property.
      Returns:
      possible object is String

      public void setFilterLogic(String value)
      Sets the value of the filterLogic property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is String

    • getLookupFields

      public List<ConversationRecordLookupField> getLookupFields()
      Gets the value of the lookupFields property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the lookupFields property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getLookupFields().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ConversationRecordLookupField

      Returns:
      The value of the lookupFields property.
